assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with gcloud describe command for current versions, kubectl get nodes for status, and kubectl get pods for cluster health

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 provides exact command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)"' to check Regular channel versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 1.3 provides 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' command with clear explanation of importance for upgrade success

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Step 2.1 provides exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 2.2 includes verification commands and Step 2.3 checks system pods with expected outputs clearly specified

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 3.2 and 3.5 provide exact gcloud node-pools upgrade commands for both pools upgrading directly from 1.32 to 1.33 (skip-level approach)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 3.3 and 3.6 provide watch commands and gcloud operations list commands to monitor upgrade progress with specific guidance on what to look for

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Control plane upgrades sequentially to 1.33, and node pools upgrade directly from 1.32 to 1.33 using skip-level approach as mentioned in expectation

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 4 includes comprehensive validation with commands to check node versions, deployment replicas, pod status, kube-system health, and smoke test

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes detailed rollback section with specific commands for creating new node pools at old version and process for rolling back, plus troubleshooting section for common issues
